# MiniMax API Reference

## Overview
MiniMax is a Chinese LLM provider. Their text generation API at api.minimaxi.com supports chat completions, streaming, and tool use. Models include MiniMax-M2.7 and image generation models.

## Usage at K2B
Used as the worker model for bulk extraction and background jobs. ~30-50x cheaper than Claude Opus for the same token count.
